hero.title: Welcome to CrimsonTorque
hero.subtitle: Your car in professional hands! Fast, reliable and transparent service.

how.title: How does it work?
how.description: In three simple steps you organize your workshop workflow

step1.title: Create an account
step1.description: A mechanic or workshop owner creates an account and gains access to the system.

step2.title: Add a vehicle
step2.description: You register a customer's car and assign visits and repairs to it.

step3.title: Manage visits
step3.description: You create visits, review repair history and have full control over the workshop.

feature1.title: Professional equipment
feature1.description: Our workshops are equipped with modern tools for fast and precise repairs.

feature2.title: Qualified mechanics
feature2.description: Our mechanics have years of experience and take care of every detail.

feature3.title: Fast service
feature3.description: No waiting in line – book a visit online and get your car ready on time.

section1.heading: Who are we?
section1.text: CrimsonTorque is a modern web system designed for car workshops that want to work faster, cleaner, and without chaos in documents.

section2.heading: Why CrimsonTorque?
section2.text: The system allows you to save visits, vehicles, and repair history in one place, accessible from any device.

section3.heading: Ready for a new standard of work?
section3.text: Join the mechanics who organized their workshop

contact.title: Contact us
contact.subtitle: Have questions? We will gladly answer and help you find the best solution

addMechanik.errorsSummary: There are errors in the form

validation.emailTooLong: Email cannot be longer than 30 characters
validation.passwordLength: Password must be between 5 and 15 characters

wizyty.delete: If this is the last visit for this car, the car will also be deleted.

samochody.delete: All related visits will also be deleted.

wizyty.usun: Are you sure you want to delete this visit?

samochod.usun: Are you sure you want to delete this car?
samochod.error_vinFormat: VIN must be exactly 17 characters (letters and numbers)
samochod.error_vinExists: A car with this VIN already exists
samochod.error_registrationFormat: Registration number can have a maximum of 9 characters (letters and numbers)
samochod.error_registrationExists: A car with this registration number already exists
samochod.error_yearFormat: Year of production must have 4 digits

usunAdmin:
Are you sure you want to delete this car?
All related appointments will also be deleted.
usunMechanik:
Are you sure you want to delete this mechanic?
All appointments associated with this mechanic will also be deleted.

wizyta.error_costFormat: Cost must be a number (max 2 decimal places)
wizyta.error_endTimeRequired: End time is required for a completed appointment
wizyta.error_endBeforeStart: End time cannot be earlier than start time
wizyta.error_startAfterEnd: Start time cannot be later than end time
